info.title: What is a User?
info.description: A User represents an individual who can access and interact with MapexOS. Users are authenticated, assigned roles, and granted permissions to perform specific actions within the system based on their organizational scope.

authentication.title: Authentication & Authorization
authentication.text: Secure login with support for internal credentials and external identity providers

rolePermissions.title: Role-Based Permissions
rolePermissions.text: Users inherit permissions from assigned roles, controlling what they can view and modify

multiOrg.title: Multi-Organization Access
multiOrg.text: Users can access multiple customer organizations with different permission levels

profile.title: Profile Management
profile.text: Manage user information including name, email, job title, and contact details

activity.title: Activity Tracking
activity.text: Track user actions, login history, and audit trails for compliance and security

empty.title: no users found
empty.description: it seems there are no users matching your current search criteria or you don't have any users yet.

messages.confirmDelete: are you sure you want to delete the user "{name}"?

tourButton.title: Start a Guided Tour
tourButton.description: Click this button anytime to start an interactive walkthrough of this page. The tour will guide you through all the features and functionalities available.

header.title: Users Overview
header.description: This is the Users page. Here you can manage all users in your organization.

filters.title: Filters & Search
filters.description: Use the search bar and status filter to quickly find specific users.

advancedFiltersBtn.title: Advanced Filters
advancedFiltersBtn.description: Click this button to open the advanced filters panel with additional search criteria.

advancedFiltersOpen.title: Advanced Filters Panel
advancedFiltersOpen.description: Here you can configure detailed search criteria like email, name, organization scope, and more. Apply or reset filters as needed.

results.title: Users List
results.description: Users appear as rows. Click to view details, or double-click to edit.

rowActions.title: Row Actions
rowActions.description: Each row has an action menu (⋮) with options to Edit, View Details, or Delete. Single-click opens the details drawer, double-click opens the edit form.

addNew.title: Create a User
addNew.description: Ready to create a user? Click Next for a guided creation walkthrough!

detail.title: user details
detail.description: view user profile, access, and group memberships

empty.title: no memberships
empty.description: this user has no memberships in any organization

apiNotAvailable.title: feature in development
apiNotAvailable.description: the user access management feature is currently being developed. check back soon!

empty.title: no groups
empty.description: this user is not a member of any groups
